title: TimetableFirestoreDocument
description: Firestore document schema for a published or saved user timetable in the 'timetables' collection.

timetableId.description: The unique document ID for this timetable.

ownerId.description: The UID of the Google authenticated user who owns this timetable.

ownerEmail.description: The email of the Google authenticated user who owns this timetable.

imageUrl.description: The public or direct URL to the timetable image stored in Cloud Storage.

isPublished.description: Flag indicating if this timetable is shared publicly on the campus map.

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp indicating creation time.

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp indicating the last update time.

extractedData.description: Object containing the OCR extracted schedule data.

title.description: Descriptive title for the timetable, e.g., 'Department of Civil Engineering - Year 2'.

schedule.description: Array of lecture slots representing the weekly schedule.

day.description: The day of the week the lecture is held.

time.description: The time slot, formatted clearly as HH:MM - HH:MM (e.g., '08:00 - 10:00').

course.description: The course code or course title, e.g., 'PHY 201'.

venue.description: The lecture hall, classroom, or lab location where the class is held.
